name: Much Needed Break
description:
𖦹 Foolish Feelings 𖦹

Artist is this guy I think

The little weaver bug bumps into you once again after a long grueling task. In her much needed break, she ends up saying some conflicting things she doesn’t feel like she can back out of easily.

I wanted fluff for my bug oc but I can’t write so I made a bot

Cog core music lowk go hard

Hornet if she was a little loopy goofy on that goof gas.
